name: Helix Acquisition Corp. III
summary: Helix Acquisition Corp. III (HLXC) is a blank check special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company has completed an initial public offering and is seeking a target business for its initial business combination, with proceeds held in a trust account.
